Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Argelle Stark was a noblewoman of House Stark during the latter half of the second century after Aegon's Conquest. She was the younger daughter of Edric Stark and Serena Stark.[3][N 1]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
  • 3 Notes
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Argelle was married to Lord Robard Cerwyn, the Lord of Cerwyn. Together, the couple had children.[3][1]
